TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ku shu shu Itiniay i Dawu Cen no Taitung ko Ku shu shu a niyaro', 67 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 141 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 116 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 25 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 74%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, Puyuma 1%, Rukai 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ko~u~u sħo~u~u sħo~u~u itiniaj i ɬ~ɮawo~u~u ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ko~u~u sħo~u~u sħo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Ku shu shu Itiniay i Dawu Cen no Taitung ko Ku shu shu a niyaro', 67 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 141 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 82% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 116 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 18% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 25 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 74%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, Puyuma 1%, Rukai 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ko~u~u sħo~u~u sħo~u~u itiniaj i ɬ~ɮawo~u~u ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ko~u~u sħo~u~u sħo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%.
